How's it going team? In this video I want to walk you through some of the features of acuity scheduling and why we use it. Acuity scheduling is quite a few uses. It allows clients to schedule their own appointments so you don't have to do it for them. They can do it as part of the ad sign up. They can do it from a link or on a web page that you control. That way they're able to get those appointments scheduled right away and you don't have to wait on them. That gives you more speed to getting them scheduled and getting them in the door. You can set schedules per calendar so the clients can schedule at any time you mark available so you can restrict what times they're able to schedule or how many people can schedule for one single time slot. You can even create calendars per person. There's a lot of automation with acuity. It connects with APR as the ability to send appointment reminders and even sends new appointment notifications. That way you can get an email or text message when somebody creates a new appointment. You can share a link directly to available times for a calendar or appointment type. That way they're able to go right to that link. They click on it and they're able to schedule right away so you can send that text message or an email. It works really well. You can also embed a live schedule on a web page like in ClickFunnels when you go through your ad funnel. You can put that live schedule in there. That way it's part of going through that funnel that opt-in. They're scheduling their appointment right away. We're going to give you a few different videos on how to do some features with acuity. The first one is your initial sign up and setup video. Make sure you follow along. Let us know if you have any questions and I hope you have a great rest of your day.
